text: Multi-modal input: voice notes, photos, SMS/email → journal
description:
Current: Manual markdown file creation
Vision: Capture experiences effortlessly throughout the day

Input channels:
- Voice notes (phone app → transcription via Whisper)
- Photos with auto-captioning (phone → GPT-4V description)
- SMS/email forwarding (forward thoughts → parser)
- Mobile quick-capture app

Processing pipeline:
- All inputs → unified format
- AI clustering into journal entries
- Auto-markdown generation
- Append to /ideas/ directory

Implementation: ~16-24 hours
This completes "just experience" - capturing life becomes frictionless.
